action.reasoning: Observation: Training completed in ~457s (7.6 min) for 1M timesteps with the custom MinigridExtractor. No eval has been run yet for this checkpoint. Analysis: I need to measure whether the embedding-based CNN/MLP extractor improved the 0% success rate from the flat-observation baseline. The training time is manageable (~8 min per 1M steps), so depending on the result I can scale up timesteps, adjust architecture, or add curriculum learning. Decision: Submit evaluation for the iter_4 checkpoint immediately to get a baseline score.
